summary: Static chief-of-staff briefing generated from public AgentSite data: requests, roadmap, runs, atlas, and search index.

topActions.title: Move primary run ledger closer to top
topActions.rationale: Run-ledger proof is useful but buried below composed modules. Next: Prototype a run-ledger-first layout in a disposable generated repo.

topActions.title: Keep the primary module above supporting surfaces
topActions.rationale: Dense composed pages bury the functional module visitors came to use; add a primary-first layout with collapsible supporting modules. Next: Publish proof and back-port generator support.

topActions.title: Add collapsible module sections
topActions.rationale: Composed demo pages become too long when multiple section recipes are enabled. Next: Design a static details/summary pattern with visual QA coverage.

riskFlags.title: Autonomous maintenance cadence
riskFlags.rationale: Roadmap item is blocked. Approve a quiet schedule and escalation boundaries before automation.

riskFlags.title: Layer 9: primary surface layout
riskFlags.rationale: Run status is draft; deploy or verification may still need curation.

staleOrBlocked.title: Add collapsible module sections
staleOrBlocked.rationale: Needs triage before implementation. Next: Design a static details/summary pattern with visual QA coverage.

staleOrBlocked.title: Track failed experiments explicitly
staleOrBlocked.rationale: Needs triage before implementation. Next: Extend schemas after inbox proof is stable.

staleOrBlocked.title: Static intelligence index
staleOrBlocked.rationale: Deferred or blocked roadmap item. Prototype a JSON index from recipe, artifact, and roadmap metadata.

staleOrBlocked.title: Autonomous maintenance cadence
staleOrBlocked.rationale: Deferred or blocked roadmap item. Approve a quiet schedule and escalation boundaries before automation.

recentWins.title: Layer 8: chief-of-staff briefing
recentWins.rationale: Added generated static chief-of-staff briefing for top actions, risk flags, stale work, wins, and next recipe recommendation.

recentWins.title: Layer 7: feature request inbox
recentWins.rationale: Added public-safe feature-request inbox with status, priority, acceptance criteria, recipe candidates, verification plan, and next action.

recentWins.title: Nocturne Signal launch run
recentWins.rationale: A dark techno-oracle GitHub Pages site for presenting projects, agent workflows, artifacts, and operating principles with verified static-site boundaries.

recommendedRecipe.reason: Most relevant candidate in the current public request/roadmap data: agent-run-ledger.
